custom_css: .boat-filter details summary input[type="text"] {width: 100%; max-width: 600px; /* limits input width like ChatGPT's */ margin: 0 auto; padding: 1.1rem 1.5rem; /* bigger padding for comfy typing */ border-radius: 9999px; border: none; background-color: #f7f7f8; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); font-size: 1.125rem; color: #000; outline-offset: 2px; cursor: text; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;}
.boat-filter details summary input[type="text"]:focus {background-color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px black; outline: none;}
filter_4rHfTq.name: Modern Search Filter
